calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b OFC-analog devaluation sensitivity (MECH-263 sig a; representation-level, aversive-outcome direct-drive)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-8 deliverable 1/2. MECH-263 devaluation-sensitivity functional signature of the OFC state_code (representation-level: the OFC bias head is frozen-zeroed/untrained, so behaviour-change is not measurable -- FULL SD-033b promotion still needs the deferred trained-head behavioural arm, parallel to SD-033a GAP-1). SUBSTRATE FINDING: the OFC reads only z_world + z_harm and has NO appetitive value/drive input, so the user-preferred SD-049 satiety instrument AND the GAP-3 counter-evidence primitive are both invisible to the OFC state_code; this uses an AVERSIVE outcome devaluation (z_harm dropped at a fixed z_world state) which the OFC genuinely sees. Matched DEVALUE-vs-CONTROL arms, measure state_code divergence onset within bounded EMA ticks. Interpretation grid in docstring: PASS=devaluation-sensitive; FAIL=insensitive; non_contributory/substrate_ceiling (diverges but not bounded) -> /failure-autopsy. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Full run 3/3 seeds PASS at smoke (ticks_to_div 9-18 < 20). Watch the phase3-queue snapshot race (see /queue-experiment Step 8 post-commit check).

items.title: SD-033b OFC-analog task-role discrimination (MECH-263 sig b; same-sensory/different-task-stage direct-drive)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-8 deliverable 2/2. MECH-263 same-sensory/different-task-role functional signature of the OFC state_code (representation-level; same trained-head caveat as 485b). Two distinct task-context z_world histories converge on a byte-identical matched final input; the state_code (gate-modulated EMA over z_world history) is tested for separability at the matched input vs within-context jitter. The GAP-3 dual-cue primitive was NOT used (its cues are perceptually DISTINCT, not the perceptually-identical/different-task-role signature). Interpretation grid in docstring: PASS=task-role separable; FAIL=sensory-only; non_contributory/substrate_ceiling (state_code collapses or matched-input control fails) -> /failure-autopsy. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Full run 4/4 reps PASS at smoke (separation_ratio 67-297 >> 3). Watch the phase3-queue snapshot race.

items.title: goal-pipeline FORCED-SEED L1 positive control (GAP-7; z_goal SEEN decoupled from GAP-2 foraging)
items.note: GAP-7 L1 deliverable. 626a wired update_z_goal (Class-1 fix) but its ARM_A positive control drew benefit from ecological foraging -> seeds that never foraged (GAP-2) showed z_goal=0 and the harness could not separate signal-absent from signal-present-but-inert (autopsy V3-EXQ-603e-626a-622). 626b adds a genuine FORCED-SEED positive-control arm (benefit forced supra-threshold fed to update_z_goal every step, run_stage0_nursery pattern) decoupled from foraging, plus a no-benefit negative control and a z_goal-off parity control. PASS re-establishes the L1 positive control the harness can SEE, dependent only on the harness fix + GoalState gate, NOT GAP-2. claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Dry-run smoke PASS (C1/C2/C3/C4 all True). Watch the phase3-queue snapshot race (see /queue-experiment Step 8 post-commit check).
